summary: US President Trump has postponed a planned large-scale military strike on Iran following requests from Gulf allies and ongoing nuclear negotiations. Iran has activated air defenses in Isfahan, Qeshm, and Kish islands amid reports of hostile objects and smoke in southern Tehran. Meanwhile, the IDF continues operations in Lebanon, specifically targeting Hezbollah infrastructure in Bint Jbeil.
key_points: President Trump postponed a planned large-scale attack on Iran scheduled for tomorrow following requests from Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and UAE (Source: @lelotsenzura/91953).
Iran activated air defense systems in Isfahan, Qeshm, and Kish islands after detecting hostile objects in the airspace (Source: @naya_foriraq/75640, @SharghDaily/160716, @almogboker78/17042).
Smoke was observed rising from southern Tehran near the Yadegar Highway at 1246Z (Source: @shin_persian/6062).
US Air Force B-1B and B-52H bombers conducted 50 training sorties from RAF Fairford since the ceasefire (Source: @shin_persian/6057).
The US has proposed a temporary 'waive' of Iranian oil sanctions during the current negotiation period (Source: @VahidOnline/75535).
IDF Givati Brigade conducted a raid on a government hospital in Bint Jbeil, Lebanon, to destroy Hezbollah infrastructure (Source: @idf_telegram/23733).
Four Palestinian suspects were arrested in Nahal Hadera after a reported plot to carry out an attack (Source: @pkpoi/142104).
Air raid sirens were activated in the Malkia area due to the infiltration of a hostile aircraft (Source: @idf_telegram/23729).

sections.executive_summary: President Trump has delayed a planned large-scale military strike on Iran to allow for critical negotiations and at the request of Gulf partners. Iran is currently on high alert with air defenses active in Isfahan and southern islands, coinciding with reports of smoke in southern Tehran. Operational activity remains high in Lebanon with IDF raids in Bint Jbeil and airspace incursions near Malkia.

points: Air defense systems were activated on Kish and Qeshm islands following the detection of hostile objects in the airspace (Source: @SharghDaily/160716, @naya_foriraq/75640).
Reports indicate the activation of air defense systems in Isfahan, suggesting a wide-scale defensive posture (Source: @almogboker78/17042).
Visual reports at 1246Z identified smoke rising from southern Tehran, specifically viewed from the Yadegar Highway (Source: @shin_persian/6062).
The Commander of the Khatam al-Anbiya HQ warned the US and Israel that Iran is more prepared than ever and will respond decisively to any aggression (Source: @naya_foriraq/75651).
US intelligence suggests Iran has used the ceasefire to uncover dozens of previously bombed ballistic missile sites and reposition mobile launchers (Source: @New_security8200/199404).
Air raid sirens were triggered in the Malkia region following the detection of a hostile aircraft infiltrating Israeli airspace (Source: @idf_telegram/23729).
Security forces in the Coast District arrested four suspects, including a Palestinian resident, in Nahal Hadera during a counter-terrorism operation (Source: @pkpoi/142104).
The Home Front Command released a version update for its emergency application based on lessons learned during the current war (Source: @inon_yttach/8146).
Finance Minister Smotrich is scheduled to hold a press conference to deliver an 'important statement' (Source: @N12chat/208072).
Four suspects were apprehended in the Nahal Hadera area, including a resident of the Palestinian Authority suspected of planning an attack (Source: @pkpoi/142104).
The IDF Givati Brigade carried out a targeted operation at a government hospital in Bint Jbeil to eliminate Hezbollah infrastructure (Source: @idf_telegram/23733).
Reports indicate the flight of combat aircraft toward Lebanese airspace, prompting warnings for extreme caution (Source: @redlinkleb/14556).
Explosions were reported in the Sulaymaniyah Governorate in northern Iraq (Source: @naya_foriraq/75643).
German Chancellor Friedrich Merz condemned renewed Iranian airstrikes against the UAE and other partners, specifically citing threats to nuclear facilities (Source: @shin_persian/6061).
Leaders of Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE requested President Trump to delay a planned military strike on Iran to facilitate a nuclear-free deal (Source: @lelotsenzura/91953).

key_developments: President Trump postponed a planned large-scale military strike on Iran scheduled for tomorrow at the request of Gulf allies (Source: @lelotsenzura/91953).
Iran activated air defenses in Isfahan, Qeshm, and Kish islands following the detection of hostile objects (Source: @naya_foriraq/75640, @SharghDaily/160716, @almogboker78/17042).
Smoke was observed rising from southern Tehran near the Yadegar Highway at 1246Z (Source: @shin_persian/6062).
USAF B-1B and B-52H bombers conducted 50 training sorties from RAF Fairford since the ceasefire (Source: @shin_persian/6057).
The US proposed a temporary 'waive' of Iranian oil sanctions as part of new negotiation texts (Source: @VahidOnline/75535).
IDF Givati Brigade raided a government hospital in Bint Jbeil, Lebanon, to destroy Hezbollah infrastructure (Source: @idf_telegram/23733).
Hostile aircraft infiltration triggered air raid sirens in the Malkia area of Israel (Source: @idf_telegram/23729).
sections.threat_assessment: The threat level remains critical as the US maintains a 'ready to proceed' posture for a large-scale strike on Iran despite the current postponement. Iran's activation of air defenses in Isfahan and the Gulf, combined with the reported smoke in Tehran, suggests an immediate tactical reaction to perceived threats. The repositioning of Iranian ballistic missile launchers indicates a preparation for renewed escalation.
sections.regional_response: Gulf states (Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar) are actively mediating to prevent a direct US-Iran clash to protect regional stability and nuclear facilities. Germany has expressed sharp condemnation of Iranian strikes on the UAE, signaling continued Western support for Gulf security. Iran's rhetoric from the Khatam al-Anbiya HQ indicates a willingness to engage in high-intensity conflict if 'strategic errors' are made by the US or Israel.
sections.intelligence_notes: There is a high probability that President Trump's public announcements regarding the postponement of strikes are a deception operation (maskirovka), as suggested by US officials. The high volume of B-1B and B-52H sorties from RAF Fairford indicates that the US strategic bomber force is maintained at a high state of readiness. The focus on Bint Jbeil in Lebanon suggests the IDF is prioritizing the degradation of Hezbollah's command and control nodes.
